40	
41	    def __init__(
42	        self,
43	        server_url: str,
44	        storage: TokenStorage,
45	        client_id: str,
46	        client_secret: str,
47	        token_endpoint_auth_method: Literal["client_secret_basic", "client_secret_post"] = "client_secret_basic",
48	        scopes: str | None = None,
49	    ) -> None:
50	        """Initialize client_credentials OAuth provider.
51	
52	        Args:
53	            server_url: The MCP server URL.
54	            storage: Token storage implementation.
55	            client_id: The OAuth client ID.
56	            client_secret: The OAuth client secret.
57	            token_endpoint_auth_method: Authentication method for token endpoint.
58	                Either "client_secret_basic" (default) or "client_secret_post".
59	            scopes: Optional space-separated list of scopes to request.
60	        """
61	        # Build minimal client_metadata for the base class
62	        client_metadata = OAuthClientMetadata(
63	            redirect_uris=None,
64	            grant_types=["client_credentials"],
65	            token_endpoint_auth_method=token_endpoint_auth_method,
66	            scope=scopes,
67	        )
68	        super().__init__(server_url, client_metadata, storage, None, None, 300.0)
69	        # Store client_info to be set during _initialize - no dynamic registration needed
70	        self._fixed_client_info = OAuthClientInformationFull(
71	            redirect_uris=None,
72	            client_id=client_id,
73	            client_secret=client_secret,
74	            grant_types=["client_credentials"],
75	            token_endpoint_auth_method=token_endpoint_auth_method,
76	            scope=scopes,
77	        )
78

139	    cur.execute(f"INSERT INTO messages (sender, recipient, body) VALUES ('{sender}', '{recipient}', '{body}')")
140	    con.commit()
